z-raised.$description: z-index ladder (semantic stacking order). raised = locally lifted within a component: a sticky table header & first column, a flow node title over its diamond, a heartbeat dot over its ping.

z-sticky.$description: A sticky plane that must outrank raised siblings — the pinned-column header corner, which sits above both the sticky row and the sticky column.

z-dropdown.$description: Detached layers anchored to a trigger: menus, selects, comboboxes, popovers.

z-overlay.$description: Full-viewport overlays and their backdrops: modal, drawer, side-peek, lightbox.

z-tooltip.$description: Tooltips — above overlays so a tip raised from inside a dialog stays visible.

z-toast.$description: Toasts / transient notifications — top of the stack.
